scripts.lint: redocly lint common/models.yaml auth/api.yaml profile/api.yaml slots/api.yaml bookings/api.yaml chefs/api.yaml
scripts.build-docs: redocly build-docs auth/api.yaml --output dist/auth.html && redocly build-docs profile/api.yaml --output dist/profile.html && redocly build-docs slots/api.yaml --output dist/slots.html && redocly build-docs bookings/api.yaml --output dist/bookings.html && redocly build-docs chefs/api.yaml --output dist/chefs.html
